claims.quote: Welcome to Cleveland Clinic’s GME program, one of the largest in the country. claims.quote: Opportunities to teach medical students, residents and other fellows within the clinical environment as well as within a didactic setting.

claims.quote: Fellows are extensively trained through rotations through the following disciplines and services:Chronic Pain Management (core rotation).Regional Pain Practice.Inpatient Acute and Chronic Pain Medicine.Neurology: Headaches and Facial Pain Center.Cancer Pain and Palliative Medicine.Psychiatry for Pain Specialist.Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation.Anesthesiology for the Non-Anesthesiologist.Neuroradiology (elective).

claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Curriculum/rotation structure for ACGME fellowship — Tier 2 trainee detail.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on positions, application, contact, and director; missed the curriculum rotation enumeration in the Overview section.
